meaning: n.(=hematopoiesis)[鍖籡閫犺浣滅敤,鐢熻浣滅敤
examples: The red marrow has hemopoiesis function.
Purpose: To observe the effects of extracted Gelsemium Elegans Benth(GEB) on hemopoiesis in mice.
Since bleomycin A6 is less toxic to hemopoiesis and immune function, this conjugate might be more safer for leukemia chemotherapy.
